feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BW/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP BW/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Dynamic data partitioning in BW4/HANA
entry.content:
HI,

We are trying to implement Dynamic data partitioning on ACDOCA ADSO which is built on a streaming process.

The current volume data in ADSO is around 2 B records. The automated partitioning on data base level which is hash partition is implemented.

When we tried dynamic partitioning on the active table through BW application perspective in properties. The field 'Fiscal Year' is selected as field for partition. Granularity Field is greyed out.

indexserver.ini -> [partitioning] ->"allow_dynamic_range_partitioning" with value "true” is set.

After this the ADSO is checked and activated which further prompts for remodeling, after the successful remodeling of an ADSO, it is observed that there is no impact on ADSO Active table, which means the partition is not implemented.

 

Question is there any prerequisite or any missed step which is missed here because of which the active table is not partitioned?

Also is this activity a transport required activity or can be done directly in production?

entry.title: BW/4 conversion: Export datasources 8* - can it deleted before the conversion?
entry.content:
Hello all,

We just prepare our BW system for the BW/4HANA conversion.

In the Precheck of transaction RSB4HCONV it says that we should migrate our 3.x-datasources - but they are all export datasources, beginning with 8* (e.g. 80PUR_C01 or 80PERS_VAR). Some data of our BW system are transferred to another BW target system.

My question is: I know, that the 8*-datasource are no longer supported in BW/4. Do we really need to migrate them in the preparation phase or can we delete them already now? Are these 8*-datsources necessary to transfer the data from our BW system to the other BW system in BW 7.5? 
What shall we do with these datasources?

Thanks & regards,
Yvonne

entry.title: SAP BW - Master Data Delta Load
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

We did a master data enhancement and planning to move the changes to production.

We are using as delta load in BW can someone, please help us on the cut over activities to be perform before moved the changes to ECC Prod.

Do we need to clear the queue?? Like we do in 2LIS_11_VAITM?? 

Thank you for the support in advance.

 

Kind Regards,

Venkat

entry.title: BW4HANA Views catalog
entry.content:
Hello,

We have been using BW4HANA last 2 years and accumulated over 600 calculated views (CVs).

One of the challenges to identify the data fields in the views. Is there any API available to read the metadata of the CVs to identify the data fields? Currently it is very challenging to identify the fields unless you use studio or some kind of reporting tools. 

Any advise related to this topic is much appreciated .

Thank you !

entry.title: CDS like 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR DataSource
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Please let me know the CDS view which used like the 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR DataSource. 

Until now I am using 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR DataSource which was enhanced with few custom fields and replicated the 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR DataSource to BW.

Now, I would like to replace this 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR DataSource with a cds view, and use the CDS view for BW system.

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: Peak Memory by HOST for Column store in BWP after RISE
entry.content:
We are seeing lower values in TB for Peak Memory by HOST for Column store in BWP after RISE

PFA document with Screenshots and below is the SQL that we used.

SELECT CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, HOST, COMPONENT, 
ROUND(SUM(EXCLUSIVE_SIZE_IN_USE)/DIGITS, 0,ROUND_HALF_UP) MEM_GB 
FROM M_HEAP_MEMORY WHERE EXCLUSIVE_SIZE_IN_USE > DIGITS GROUP BY HOST, COMPONENT;

HOST After RISE:  vhhpgbphdb01 & vhhpgbphdb02 - and peak memory column values showing around 10 or 11 TB

HOST Before RISE:  hpibphdb11 & hpibphdb12 - peak memory column values showing around 1 TB


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change BW Query Initial Variable Input at runtime
entry.content:
Hi guys!!

I have a BW Query that is used as infoprovider in order to load inventory values (non cumulative) into an ADSO. I have to laod several weeks of history and we have more than 200 hundred plants (it a huge volumen of data).  Right now I'm using a SAP Exit variable with an offset to load the diferents weeks and several queries to load separate plants in order to avoid a memory error.

So, I would like to use just one query instead of creating several Query and change the variable via ABAP during the execution of the DTP, is this feasible?

Thank you all.

BR Oscar

entry.title: Re: SAP BW - Master Data Delta Load
entry.content:
Regards venkatesh

Speaking of master data, Cut Over activities depend on the changes you made.

If you only added attributes, it is just a matter of importing the changes to production and loading the new data. If it is a delta load, the new field will begin to fill little by little.

If you modified existing attributes (for example, data type change) you must validate that these attributes are not used in cubes/ADSO so that you can import your changes. If it exists in a cube/ADSO, you must first delete the content of the cubes to be able to import the changes (due to SIDS management issues).

I hope to be helpful. Greetings.

BR Oscar A.

entry.title: Merge cells in analysis for office?
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to merge a cell in the result of analysis for office? Something like the screenshot below.

So 3rd column calculation was the percentage of number of Ys / Total rows, so 3/5*100 = 60%.

Or what's the nearest result where I can achieve this kind of output?

Thanks.

Loed

entry.title: max. excel export in BW4web
entry.content:
Hello,

we're on BW4HANA SP2.

How can I increase the max. number of excel rows in the export function of the transaction BW4WEB ?

I found no possibilities in the settings.

 

Thanks

entry.title: authorization 0RSPL_FILE_UPLOAD_AO
entry.content:
Hi, 

I created a planning function on the top of 0RSPL_FILE_UPLOAD_AO - File Upload from AO and enabled the authorization (filter AG_FL_AUC_02). This planning function loads csv file from users machine to SAP BW adso.  

Unfortunately, SU53 generates the following error message that requires to grant user an authorization to activity types 2, 6  for filter of the aggregation level (change, delete). This authorization is granted for developers in DEV environment only.

I believe that this error message is fake and additional authorization to access csv file is required. Do u have a clue what is missing over here? See attached.  

Thanks

entry.title: Entity in schema not found error when creating datasource on HANA_SDA connection
entry.content:
Hi all,

When trying to create a datasource on HANA_SDA connection I am getting this error in BW/4 
Entity V_QUOTE in schema PCM_A_SDA.<NULL>.DBS06A_BW_RO not found

Message No. RSDS392

Other information that might be useful.
The Remote Source PCM_TEST is created as an SDA/SDI remote source using the Oracle Adapter in the Provisioning folder and works as expected on the HANA DB side.
The HANA_SDA connection PCM_A_SDA is created successfully in BW/4HANA as a SAP HANA Smart Data Access connection type.
We checked traces on the DB and BW/4 side and nothing came up.

Do you have any suggestions how to fix this issue?



Thanks,
Ioan

entry.title: Value is not coming for a new node in rsrt
entry.content:
Hi All,

I created a new Node in the BEx as shown below

with the below selection details

But in RSRT screen only this columns is refelecting but no data is coming although, there is data available in the ACDOCA table shown in the below screenshot.

 

Kindly help me with this issue.

Regards,

Saima Afreen

entry.title: Percentage Key Figure
entry.content:
How to calculate a percentage key figure in BW query?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to write select query in BW transformations
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I want to display current date in one of the field routine of the BW transformations. I wrote the below code in field routine and getting the error message as
Incorrect syntax error near :CUR_DATE.

outtab = select (select current_date into CUR_DATE from dummy AS "CUR_DATE"),
"RECORD",
"SQL__PROCEDURE__SOURCE__RECORD"
from :INTAB;

Please guide me how to solve this error.

Thanks.

entry.title: Error Switching to B4H Mode: "Unexpected Situation Occurred. Please Contact SAP"
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently encountering an issue when attempting to switch our operating mode to B4H. Despite ensuring that all prerequisite tasks have been completed, we consistently receive the following error message: "Unexpected situation occurred. Please contact SAP."

Has anyone else faced this problem before? If so, how were you able to resolve it? Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated as we are trying to troubleshoot this issue but are unsure what might be causing it.

Thank you in advance for your help and support!

Best regards,

Jonas

entry.title: SAP Field service management to BW/4Hana
entry.content:
Hi all, 
I am looking for infomation on connection SAP FSM to BW/4HANA or Datasphere.
Does anybody has experiences with that or can give some hints.

Thanks Dirk

entry.title: BW HANA Sizing - Results interpretation /SDF/HANA_BW_SIZING
entry.content:
How should the results of the report /SDF/HANA_BW_SIZING be interpreted? is the recommended physical memory per node the final "HANA DB size" also displayed in the Readiness check report? It is very confusing as the sum of the memory 838 GB + data 1271 GB + log 512 GB disk size, is not equal to the recommended physical memory per node (1536 GB). 

Thanks for any clarification.

entry.title: What are the best approach to store/replicate historical data and when Delta merge fails? (SLT)
entry.content: Currently we are replicating data form S/4 to BW/4 HANA system using SLT(using Delta merge). But we are facing issue while replicating ACDOCA data due to huge volume of data (using SLT Delta Merge). What are the best approaches to store/replicate historical data and when Delta merge fails

entry.title: How to display the text of InfoObjects of ADSO in HANA *8 View comments ?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

     The text of InfoObject G0COMPANY is "G0COMPANY" in BW ADSO ZADSO_001. 

    But the corresponding HANA View /BIC/AZADSO_0018(*8 View) has no comment of field.

 

This is the system design or a bug ?

Tks.
